agent_summary: Customer reports: "My merchant settlement of 25000 taka is delayed for 3 days" Classified as merchant_settlement_delay. Evidence cross-checked against Transaction TXN-7001.
recommended_next_action: Check the merchant settlement pipeline for the matched transaction and notify merchant operations.
customer_reply: Thank you for reporting the settlement delay (reference TXN-7001). Our merchant operations team will look into the settlement status and update you through our official in-app support channel or hotline.
